evals.prompt: Write a README.md for a Go CLI tool that processes CSV files
evals.expected_output: Complete README with logo, badges, quick start, and installation sections

evals.prompt: Audit this README and identify broken badges, missing sections, and stale content
evals.expected_output: Checklist of issues with specific fix recommendations

evals.prompt: Create a project SVG logo and add it to the README header
evals.expected_output: SVG logo with gradient text, tech stack chips, and centered README placement
assertions: renders in light and dark themes
